rationale: The cited paper appears only in grouped citations, first in background framing about prior work on processes behind brand personality and later as an example of inference-updating work for future extensions. The 2015 paper does not adopt Johar et al.'s trait-versus-evaluative inferencing framework to derive hypotheses, define constructs, or analyze results. Its main contribution is a neural decoding approach to pre-existing brand personality associations, centered on Aaker-style trait dimensions rather than the cited paper's updating mechanism. This indicates a contextual mention rather than a substantive dependency.
